{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Soulsmith Serenity
| aliases = Elder Serenity
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder Serenity was confirmed slain in battle.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Soulsmith Serenity]] is a [[Soulsmith]] of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Elder Harbek, Elder Nasiri, and Elder Serenity were all confirmed slain in battle,”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
